---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement for xRenderEngine
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that xRenderEngine doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. If relevant, note which crate it touches
(`xre-core`, `xre-term`, `xre-tui`, `xre-render`, `xre-scene`, `xre-engine`).

## Roadmap fit

Does this align with a planned phase in
[`RiftEngine-Plan/`](../../RiftEngine-Plan/), or is it new scope? (See the
out-of-scope / parking-lot list in `13-risks-open-questions.md`.)

## Alternatives considered
